name: agent-os
description: Personal, secret-safe sidecar activation, workspace recovery, checkpointing, software design, and risk-scaled delivery workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Design and deliver personal software workflows safely.
interface.longDescription: Activate personal Skills outside target repositories, recover secret-safe workspace readiness from durable remote state, persist coherent checkpoints across replaceable environments, design from repository-owned facts, and scale verification with demonstrated risk.
defaultPrompt: Complete this private Linear issue through its linked GitHub repository.
Resume this private task from its latest GitHub checkpoint.
Activate Agent OS Skills outside this target repository without changing its Git state.
Assess this fresh development workspace and identify its safe recovery entry point.
Checkpoint this coherent development phase before the environment is replaced.
Choose the smallest sufficient verification for this change without exposing workspace secrets.
Design this software change before implementation using repository-owned project facts.
